about.title: Orgue Vivant
about.intro: Orgue Vivant is a community initiative to keep organ music alive in downtown Lille. We organise free or low-cost concerts, open to everyone.
about.stMaurice: Built from the 14th to the 19th century, Saint-Maurice is a gem of Lille's Flamboyant Gothic style. Its Cavaillé-Coll grand organ resonates at the heart of the city.
about.stEtienne: Saint-Étienne, the former Jesuit chapel, hosts a historical organ remarkable for its classical French voicing.
about.mission: Make organ music accessible, support the next generation of organists, and showcase Lille's musical heritage.
